features.title: AI-Powered Chat
features.description: Transform your team communication with intelligent AI assistance. Get smart suggestions, automated translations, and context-aware responses that help your team collaborate seamlessly.

features.title: Smart Project Management
features.description: Manage projects with Kanban boards, Gantt charts, and sprint planning. Track progress, assign tasks, and meet deadlines with complete visibility into your team's work.

features.title: Workflow Automation
features.description: Create custom bots and automated workflows to handle repetitive tasks. From notifications to complex multi-step processes, let automation do the heavy lifting.

features.title: HD Video Conferencing
features.description: Connect with your team through crystal-clear video calls. Host meetings, share screens, and collaborate in real-time with features designed for productive remote work.

features.title: Collaborative Tools
features.description: Unlock creativity with powerful collaborative tools. Use interactive whiteboards for brainstorming, visual planning, and real-time collaboration. Perfect for design sprints and creative workshops.

features.title: Collaborative Notes
features.description: Create, share, and collaborate on documents in real-time. Build your team's knowledge base with powerful editing tools, templates, and AI-assisted writing.

features.title: 180+ Integrations
features.description: Connect Deskive with your favorite tools. Our extensive integration library ensures your workflow stays seamless across all the apps your team uses.
